slides.headline:
Web-native pitches.
Decks upgraded.
slides.subheadline: FlowPitch transforms any PPT or PDF into a stunning, shareable web experience that reads fast, looks premium, and drives decisions.

slides.headline:
The problem
PPT/PDF sharing kills momentum.
slides.subheadline: Static files break the story—and you get zero signal back.
bullets: PDFs feel like work to open

slides.headline:
The solution
Upload → Theme → Publish a pitch link.
slides.subheadline: One link. Zero friction. Looks like a mini-site.

slides.headline:
Stop sending files.
Start sending experiences.
slides.subheadline: Join founders and teams who’ve upgraded from static decks to web-native pitch links.

slides.headline:
How it works
Three steps. Two minutes.
bullets: 01  Upload your deck — PPT, PDF, or Slides link
02  Theme it your way — colors, fonts, layout
03  Publish & share — track views + what mattered
